Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: Since we know the noise contact ahead of us is a whale, if our ships have not already identified it, we can manually identify it as the player.

Hold Left Ctrl and then right click on the noise contact and then click on 'Neutral' to designate it as a neutral contact. If the contact was already identified by our sonar operators, proceed to the next step.
